## Source: kam193 (facfcba74011619f5bb2eaf096e41239f81520cb4effff3b45f8b42c84d42060)
During import, the code attempts to exfiltrate to a hardcoded location sensitive data, including private SSH keys, cloud credentials and Windows SAM database.
